ham.subject: Leave Balance Update – Q1 2024
ham.body:
Hello Team,

The HR system has processed the leave request submissions for Q1 2024. Your current leave balance has been updated accordingly. Please review the attached summary and confirm by logging into the HR portal.

If you notice any discrepancy, reply to this email and the HR team will resolve it promptly.

Best regards,
HR Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Tax Refund Verification Required – $12,000 Pending
spam.body:
Dear Valued Taxpayer,

The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has flagged your 2023 tax return for a pending refund of $12,000. Due to recent changes in compliance regulations, you must verify your account information within 48 hours to receive the payment.

Please provide the following:
- Full name and Social Security number
- Bank routing and account numbers
- A clear photo of your driver’s license or passport

Failure to comply will delay your refund by up to 30 days. Click the link below to submit your information securely:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
IRS Tax Compliance Office
